title: Update Workload Configuration
content:
# Update Workload Configuration

The App Configurations for a Kelvin SmartApp™ can be updated individually for each Workload.

    You can read the full concept of [App Configurations in the Overview ⟶ Concepts page](../../../overview/concepts/variables/app-configurations.md).

Click on the **Applications** menu item on the left sidebar menu.

Select the Application you want to edit the App Configurations and click on the **Workloads** tab.

Next click on the workload name.

Click on the **Configuration** tab and update the configurations as required. When finished click on the **Apply and Redeploy** button.

*
summary: The App Configurations for a Kelvin SmartApp™ can be updated individually for each Workload.
